title: Creatures Dominion
description: This is a mod that will have a lot of animals and even extinct ones. It is not released yet and neither finished. Please give suggestions and report bugs to me please! I hope you enjoy the mod!
body:
**This is a mod made for anyone that wants way more mobs in minecraft!**

Obviously there will be some problems as i used Mcreator to make this. But I am happy to continue this mod and make it better and better! This mod adds more creatures from all around the world, either still around or extinct! This will also have it's fair share of prehistoric animals. But mainly modern ones.

Info-Device Mechanics (Mob Information):   
![Info-Device (Tuna)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3611a377476255ddc061515c402b83b9b5aedabb.png)

Info-Device Mechanics (List Of Classes):   
![Info-Device](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9debffcd4866cc5e9f573db543dc74065ba69726.png)

**-Extinct-**

Sabertooth,

Compsognathus,
Lesothosaurus,
Gallimimus,

Gastornis,
Dire Wolf,
Anchiornis,
Stegosaurus,
Ornitholestes,
Eurhinosaurus,
Enchodus,
Broomistega_


**Check the changelog to see what else was added!**
